args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;

1.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
  ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Trondheim municipality (case-insensitive match)

2.description: load quick-clay kartleggingsomrade polygons (will be reduced by municipality spatial join)

3.description: reduce kvikkleire polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality geometry

4.description: get parcels (teig) for the found kommunenummer

5.description: find teig polygons that intersect the reduced kvikkleire polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid (deduplicate) by counting matches

8.description: return the first 10 parcels sorted by teigid

LIMIT 1;

FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade;

-- right_geom: "omrade"
